records.source_document: Getinge operating table accessories product page
records.notes: Radiolucent multi-purpose plate for patient back section. Compatible with Alphamaquet 1150, Alphamaxx, Otesus, Magnus, and Yuno II table systems. Also includes: modular back plates for shoulder operations; extension plates for large patients; trapezoidal shaped plates for ergonomic access; seat plate extensions for laparoscopy/urology. Full catalogue: maquet-operating-tables-accessories-catalog-110262-en.pdf (Getinge.com).

records.source_document: Getinge operating table accessories product page
records.notes: Radiolucent horseshoe head rest for prone and supine surgical positions. Part of Maquet comprehensive head positioning range which also includes: head rest adapters, simple head rests, and head rest adapters for compatibility with multiple table systems. For use in spinal, neurosurgical and general procedures.

records.source_document: Getinge operating table accessories product page
records.notes: Motor-driven knee positioning device. Applications: knee prosthetics (TKA/UKA), arthroscopic surgery, open surgical procedures of the knee, fracture treatment. Mounts on Maquet table rail system. Provides controlled knee flexion for surgical access.

records.source_document: Getinge operating table accessories product page
records.notes: SFC (Slow Foam Comfort) and IPC pads for levelled weight pressure distribution on Maquet tables. Latex-free material. Body-temperature adaptive foam. Reduces pressure injury risk in prolonged procedures. Used across all Maquet table platforms.

records.system_name: Maquet Flexible Four-Segment Leg Plate Set
records.source_document: Getinge operating table accessories product page
records.notes: Flexible leg plates in four segments for precise lower-limb positioning. Also available: simple leg plates, leg holders for gynaecological and urological interventions. Mounts on Maquet table rail system. Compatible with Alphamaquet, Otesus, and Magnus table systems.

records.source_document: Allen Lift-Assist Beach Chair product page — Hillrom website
records.notes: Lightweight orthopaedic beach chair positioner with Lift-Assist technology. Simplifies patient positioning for shoulder surgery (open shoulder, arthroscopic shoulder). Mounts to operating table. Compatible with Allen Universal Head Positioner. Marketed and distributed via Hillrom (now Baxter).
components: Beach chair frame with Lift-Assist mechanism
Compatible with Allen Universal Head Positioner

records.source_document: Allen Universal Head Positioner product page — Hillrom website
records.notes: Compatible with: Allen Lift-Assist Beach Chair, Allen Table-Powered Beach Chair, Allen Manual Lift Beach Chair, and Allen OR Table Adaptor. Used in shoulder surgery and cranial/neurosurgical positioning. Provides stable head support with adjustability for surgical access.

records.source_document: Allen Hug-U-Vac positioner product page — Hillrom website
records.notes: Vacuum-based patient immobilisation system for lateral positioning and steep Trendelenburg. Secures patient during lateral hip, thoracic, and urological procedures. Moulds to patient anatomy. Available in lateral and steep-Trendelenburg variants. Distributed by Baxter via Hillrom brand.

records.source_document: Allen Lateral Surgical Position Set product page — Hillrom website
records.notes: Complete lateral position set for the Allen Advance surgery table. Creates patient flex positions for access to surgical target. Used in hip, thoracic, kidney (lateral), and spinal procedures. Combines with Allen Advance table to deliver full lateral positioning capability.

records.source_document: Allen shoulder supports product page — Hillrom website
records.notes: C-shaped shoulder pads prevent patient sliding in Trendelenburg position. Conforms to patient anatomy. Designed for: gynaecology, urology, laparoscopy, general surgery, robotic surgery. Model number: A-63500. Does not restrict shoulder surgical access.
